channel.title: waapply
channel.description: Artificial Intelligence news updates from waapply.

item.title: Official: Moises Caicedo extends until 2033
item.description: The Ecuadorian midfielder extends his stay with Chelsea until 2033. Good news arrives in the Chelsea offices with the renewal of one of the team?s key pillars?

item.title: Ask AI: " Describe the Life of Sjur Torgersen in Deerfield, Wisconsin in 1867"
item.description: I wondered if my AI Assistant Anthropic Claude could provide me with information about a family's life in 1867 in Deerfield, Wiusconsin. My wife's 2nd?

item.title: Friday, April 17, 2026

item.title: Brain Technologies and SoftBank Launch Natural AI Phone in Japan
item.description: Brain Technologies launches AI-native smartphone with Natural OS in Japan via SoftBank, redefining mobile with intention-based interaction....

item.title: Loop raises $95M to build supply chain AI that predicts disruptions
item.description: The San Francisco startup closed a Series C funding round led by Antonio Gracias' firm Valor, which is a major backer of xAI.

item.title: How To Build A Marketing Technology (MarTech) Stack: Crafting A Digital Arsenal For Future Growth
item.description: Implementing a well-structured MarTech stack is vital for business growth. In this article, we explain how to build a MarTech stack for your company and reach?

item.title: Christine Lagarde: IMFC Statement
item.description: The European Central Bank (ECB) is the central bank of the European Union countries which have adopted the euro. Our main task is to maintain price stability?
